text: I feel a sense of curiosity mingled with anticipation here. The environment is sleek and modern, brimming with the silent energy of innovation. The glass walls create transparency yet separation, inviting me inside while also making me pause and reflect before crossing into the R+D space. The colorful wall and digital displays seem to promise new ideas and discoveries. I am aware of the order and cleanliness, which encourages contemplation and focused thought, making me consider the relationship between humans and technology—how we advance together and what it means to coexist with the intelligent systems we create.
